text_uthmani: فَقَدْ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِٱلْحَقِّ لَمَّا جَآءَهُمْ ۖ فَسَوْفَ يَأْتِيهِمْ أَنۢبَٰٓؤُا۟ مَا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
translation_en: and so they give the lie to this truth now that it has come unto them. In time, however, they will come to understand what it was that they were wont to deride.
